title: RUC Mining Contractors Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: RUC Mining Contractors Pty Ltd pleaded guilty in the Kalgoorlie Magistrates Court to two counts under Western Australia's Work Health and Safety Act 2020 of exposing workers to a risk of death or serious injury, and was fined $540,000 plus costs. The charges arose from an October 2022 incident at the St Ives Gold Mine near Kambalda, where a worker dismantling a reamer cutting tool at the base of a ventilation shaft was killed by a falling rock and a second worker, a probationary employee, was also injured.
scope: Pleaded guilty to two work health and safety offences following a worker's death; Fined $540,000 plus costs; A second, probationary worker was also injured in the same incident
